__source._realEquivalent: DCSA Track & Trace conformant endpoint — POST /v3/quotes with body { origin: 'INMAA', destination: 'USLAX', commodity: 'cotton-fabric-180gsm', weightKg, volumeM3, serviceMode: 'OCEAN_FCL' } returning a list of carrier offers under the DCSA v3 schema.
__source._demoNarrative: Three ocean carriers quote Chennai (INMAA) → Los Angeles (USLAX) for an order of 50,000 units of 180gsm cotton fabric (≈35 tonnes / 76 cbm — fits 2× 40HC FCL). MSC has the lowest rate; Maersk has the fastest transit. The tactics engine picks bestRateUsd by default; the L2 executive may upgrade to Maersk if the buyer's deliveryDate is tight. canMeetDeliveryDate=true assumes buyer's requested deliveryDate is ≥35 days out (max transit 27d + 5d customs + 3d truck-to-DC). Rate quotes are valid until 2026-06-01 — past that, the LogisticsProvider must re-consult.
